description_long: This bungalow features a low, rectangular profile with a broad, dark brown roof that overhangs the structure. The front facade includes a small entryway with a door and a set of vertical slats or columns, providing a sense of rhythm and privacy. On one side, a large horizontal window is visible, likely allowing ample natural light into the main living area, while the opposite side is more enclosed. The exterior walls are finished in a muted, dark color palette, with subtle architectural detailing around the entry and window frames. The roof appears to be flat or slightly pitched, contributing to the modern, streamlined appearance. The overall design suggests a single-story layout with a focus on horizontal lines and understated elegance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a broad, dark roof, vertical slats on the front, and a large side window. The structure emphasizes horizontal lines and a muted color palette.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a door and vertical slats, giving a sense of privacy and architectural rhythm.
description_view_1: The narrow side view highlights the depth of the roof and the solid, windowless side wall.
description_view_2: This side view reveals a large horizontal window and a secondary entrance, emphasizing openness and light.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a solid wall with horizontal paneling, lacking windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with a large side window
